steps.title: Identify the contrast
steps.content: The key signal is the opposition between the two eclipse scenarios: a partial eclipse in 1902 (where the Moon blocks only part of the Sun) and a total eclipse in 1921 (where it completely blocks the Sun).

steps.title: Choose the word that signals the shift
steps.content:
”On the other hand” introduces a contrasting scenario, which fits the shift from a partial to a total eclipse.

The other choices suggest causation, reinforce the first scenario rather than create a contrast, or contradict the 19-year gap between dates.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
